{
  "claims": [
    "The funding will allow Fullerton College to better equip students with skills needed to meet the growing needs of industry.",
    "Students with technical skills learned in the welding program will find a wide variety of manufacturing opportunities.",
    "There is significant demand for certified welders, welding inspectors, and manufacturing technicians in Orange County.",
    "The funds will support the purchase of welding machines capable of welding materials found in aerospace and national defense projects.",
    "Fullerton College plans to purchase new fabrication and cutting equipment to enable students to perform more complex structural weldments.",
    "The college will be adding robotic technology to its welding program in response to manufacturing's increasing adoption of welding robots and automation.",
    "The upgrades will facilitate teaching welding inspection processes and skills.",
    "Fullerton College's Helmets to Hardhats program aims to lead veterans to jobs in the manufacturing workforce.",
    "California's manufacturing sector employs more than 1.3 million workers across various industries, including aerospace and information technology."
  ]
}
